2:
You deliver the chamomile to Sandre, who is bemused by the notion that Ul'dahns could have any appreciation for the herb. Trade may flourish between nations, but it would seem that old prejudices die hard.

※The next botanist quest will be available from Fufucha upon reaching level 30.

You deliver the chamomile to Sandre, who is bemused by the notion that Ul'dahns could have any appreciation for the herb. Trade may flourish between nations, but it would seem that old prejudices die hard.

50:
Verily, we have just now received an order for no fewer than two <Emphasis>thousand</Emphasis> fine-quality sprigs of chamomile from the Quicksand in Ul'dah. So run along and harvest them, would you?
...I jest, of course! A task of this scale will require more than two hands. If you would be so good as to procure, say, fifteen sprigs, I would consider it an appropriate contribution.
